journeys.name: Principal Cannot Release Recommendation
journeys.overclaimRisk: Viewer may confuse denial proof with production authorization.
journeys.caveat: This is deterministic demo permission proof, not real auth.
journeys.captionLong: Release authority remains with compliance even when a principal can view client surfaces.
presenterNotes: Promote to video only for compliance/investor diligence.
journeys.endState: Release attempt is denied in permission proof.
